calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2015 Continued To May-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terence Mayo for (petitioner) Eva Small (who was present in court). Carole Scagnetti for (decedent's daughter) Carol Small.

Mr. Mayo reported that counsel has substituted in for Carol Small, has had no chance to review the matter and requested a 2 week continuance. The petition for spousal property was continued to May 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Continued To Apr-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terence Mayo for (Petitioner) Eva Small. Carol Small (Objector) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Small stated that she needs a continuance to attend a medical appointment, that there had been a death in the family and that she is not prepared to go forward today. Mr. Mayo stated that he had not agreed to a continuance as his client is elderly, extremely upset, that it would be costly and that he understood Ms. Small was able to have someone else take her son to the medical appointment. The court stated that it did not see the urgency of this matter, that the papers indicate the intent is to make it easier to obtain title insurance if the property is sold. Mr. Mayo stated that the urgency is the need to re-finance. The court stated that a continuation should have been granted as Ms. Small is unable to focus due to the issues going on. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to April 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
